description: Commercial contract or agreement — extract parties, dates, and key terms

fields.name: party_a_name
fields.prompt: Extract the name of the first party (Party A) in this contract.

fields.name: party_b_name
fields.prompt: Extract the name of the second party (Party B / counterparty) in this contract.

fields.name: contract_title
fields.prompt: Extract the title or type of this agreement (e.g. 'Service Agreement', 'NDA', 'Lease Agreement').

fields.name: contract_date
fields.prompt: Extract the contract signing or effective date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Return null if not found.

fields.name: start_date
fields.prompt: Extract the contract start or commencement date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Return null if not specified.

fields.name: end_date
fields.prompt: Extract the contract end or expiry date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Return null if open-ended or not specified.

fields.name: contract_value
fields.prompt: Extract the total contract value as a plain number. Return null if not explicitly stated.

fields.name: currency
fields.prompt: Extract the 3-letter ISO 4217 currency code for contract values (e.g. GBP, USD, EUR). Return null if no monetary value.

fields.name: payment_terms
fields.prompt: Summarise the payment terms in one sentence (e.g. 'Monthly in advance, net 30'). Return null if not applicable.

fields.name: auto_renewal
fields.prompt: Does this contract auto-renew? Return true, false, or null if unclear.

fields.name: key_obligations
fields.prompt: Extract a short list (max 5) of the key obligations or deliverables described in the contract as plain strings.
